name: IAM Password Policy Minimum Length
description: IAM password policy should require a minimum password length of at least 14 characters to ensure strong passwords
remediation: Update the IAM password policy to require at least 14 character passwords. Use: aws iam update-account-password-policy --minimum-password-length 14
remediation_steps: Navigate to IAM in AWS Console
Select 'Account settings' from the left menu
Set 'Minimum password length' to at least 14
